case_title: MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC VS. JOEL VINCENT DELIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELIA, JOEL VINCENT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2524 LOMBARD STREET #34 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94123 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DELIA, JOEL VINCENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DELIA, JOEL VINCENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.67. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DELIA, JOEL VINCENT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DELIA, JOEL VINCENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC SERVED AUG-25-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELIA, JOEL VINCENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DELIA, JOEL VINCENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC
